audit-trail.context_window: - (2) Collision: The collision step is a point-wise multiplication between the vector 𝐶 and the block diagonal matrix according to $$f _ { i } ^ { e q } ( \vec { x } , t ) = \omega _ { i } C ( x , t ) \left ( 1 + \frac { e _ { i } \cdot \vec { u } } { c _ { s } ^ { 2 } } \right ) , & & ( 1 )$$ excluding the depended variable vector 𝐶 ( 𝑥, 𝑡 ) .
